flagged_decisions: DEPLOY calculate-xp edge function to activate the quiz + module_complete ledger dedupe fixes (changes live XP economy — needs go-ahead).
Activity XP (call/demo/deal/win) has no per-day cap — farmable by paced clicks. Recommend a daily cap mirroring drill_complete (5/day).
B2C impliedMonthlyDeals feeds a subscriber-add count into monthly_deal_goal which Home/Today compare closed deals against — unit mismatch.
Broadcast send + manager role-change/invite are blocked by RLS but the UI reports success. Need a service-role edge function or scoped RLS policies.
Fail-open permission accessor (canView/canEdit) leaks manager-scope features on any perms-load failure. Recommend fail-closed for scope 'manager'.
No automated test suite exists. Recommend Playwright smoke tests.
